name: Block Party Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup brown sugar or 1/8 cup Twin Brown sugar
1 REG. CAN OF THE FOLLOWING BEANS:
recipeInstructions:
1. Sugar Free.
2. Saute hamburger, onions, and celery in a little oil until brown and tender. Drain off excess oil.
3. In a large deep casserole, combine all other ingredients. Drain well the green and wax beans only, then add the rest of the beans and liquid to the casserole. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
4. Place in an oven preheated to 350 degrees for about one hour. Serves about 20-25. Great for picnics or potlucks. Can be frozen and used later.
